Okay guys and girls this is big okay so the number one the biggest marketing mistake slash opportunity that most gym owners and really frankly most business owners make is they don't have a dual marketing calendar okay and so what I mean by that is that they're they're speaking most of time they're just ignoring their warm traffic meaning all the clients that they have and are only going after cold traffic right now you should have a marketing calendar that's internal which is what's called ascension right so you cross-selling up selling people into more services okay and then a cold traffic marketing calendar which is what you're telling the public okay now there is time where warm traffic will sign up for a cold traffic promotion but most of them already know about what the cold traffic promotion is because that's usually how they came in right now to keep things interesting you need to keep your members engaged and so do you do it's like you don't want to just only have offers that sound sexy to the new people because I'm sure some of you probably experienced they're like why do they always feel like they care about the new clients more than us right the way that you solve that is literally by selling them stuff like I'm not I'm not joking like the way that you keep them engaged is by getting them to buy more stuff okay and so your calendar might say here you know six week right a six week challenge or something whatever for the external world and then in turn on you're doing a booty a bootie boot camp or something okay then later on the outside you're doing a 12 week promo and then on the inside you're gonna do an accountability challenge okay and on the outside you do six week again now mind you the things that you have on the cold traffic you don't have to have nearly as many offers and it's mostly because most people have never heard of you so you really just want to be rotating between the things that work best that are most profitable for your business okay or are aligned with the services that need to be filled right you know and then again when you run this six week you might be running a you know abs you know flat tummy whatever right now what's like this is really huge like this concept is really important to understand because what happens is now it's not only having this dual calendar but also who's responsible for each right so this is usually where a salesman or Joe would come in somebody who's a hardcore salesman very you know very incentivized commission wise and who's who's a professional okay here is where you have your trainers and your staff okay and you're gonna have commission structures here as well as here for what what each one of them is gonna be earning but what's happened here is that these are all like you're gonna equip them in your in your workshops of like what's the what's our promotion right now what's the thing that we're gonna be pushing for right now it gives people something to talk about that's new and interesting it allows them to capitalize on all the relational capital that they've built up like your trainers have delivered tons and tons and tons of value to your clients and so there's no reason for them to not cash in on that by getting some some commissions and it makes your life a lot easier and so as soon as we started implementing like the internal warm traffic stuff and giving like aggressive commissions like $50 $75 commissions on like $150 programs and we made teams so each trainer had a team that they were looking after and then they got significance and they got to be a leader for something okay guess what happened all the trainers are competing amongst themselves to see who is the most popular by saying who could get the most people on their team all the while we make like 10 grand in two weeks of just cash because this is all warm traffic we already own this media we already own all of this okay so these promotions like it's all profit okay so it would be the same as running another promotion and making 30 grand and having after commissions and marketing spend etc. you know spending 20 okay it's the same so like don't scoff because the numbers are a little smaller it's all net okay so this is really important and so having this can like legitimately like double your income because it's all net profit okay so this is the big mistake that most business make they don't have a dual marketing calendar and part of this and the reason that they don't they can't really implement these effectively it's because they have a lack of internal communications that's regular and they don't train or equip their staff and get them bought in on the offers okay so huge huge opportunity for you in your business having two different marketing calendars they should be different the way that you phrase it's different the wording is different this is super warm super jovial like fun loving etc this is gonna be like more ad copy right and who's who's supporting each of this thing so really important point we're gonna be going over this in a lot of detail with all the different systems that we're gonna be implementing internally
